heroHeadline: Trump Admin to Slash Iran War Funding; Post-Ceasefire Budget Shift Signals End of Kinetic Phase
heroSubtitle: Trump announces a formal truce with Iran as Tehran agrees to guarantee safe transit through the Strait of Hormuz. Washington now expected to slash war funding requests, signaling a structural post-ceasefire shift in US posture.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
